text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fruitful days fly by, and just like that, our
time at summer camp comes to a close.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: No, it ain't like that. Ya see, I made a promise.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Once we're done with summer camp, it's off to the
Sprinters Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'll put all my hard work to the test and score me a
big win!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Let's get back to training the second we get back
to the academy!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh! But before we do, let's wrap up our time at
camp with a party!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, we put summer camp behind us and set
our sights on the Sprinters Stakes!
